title: SoundHound AI Reports Record Q3 2025 Revenue, Raises Outlook
text: SoundHound AI reported record Q3 2025 revenue of $42 million, up 68% year-over-year. Year-to-date revenue totaled $114 million, up 127% from the same period in 2024. The company raised full-year 2025 revenue guidance to $165-180 million, reflecting strong momentum across multiple customer segments and verticals. GAAP gross margin reached 43%, with non-GAAP gross margin at 59%. The company maintained a strong balance sheet with $269 million in cash and equivalents at quarter-end, with no debt. Management completed the Interactions acquisition and signed significant IoT deals including a major Chinese manufacturer partnership involving double-digit millions of smart devices. Amelia 7 platform migration progressed toward 75% customer adoption target by mid-2026. The company emphasized that the vast majority of revenue is now recurring, with diversified customer base with no single customer exceeding 10% of revenue.
